shortDescription: Contemporary 1-bedroom apartment in Entertainment District with designer finishes and vibrant neighbourhood.
fullDescription: Welcome to 80 John Street, Unit 1808 in the vibrant Entertainment District neighbourhood. This contemporary apartment features a thoughtfully designed layout that maximises natural light. The main living area impresses with nine-foot ceilings, designer fixtures, and a seamless flow between rooms. The kitchen features modern finishes including a gas range, integrated dishwasher, and pantry storage. The sleeping quarters comprise 1 comfortable bedrooms, the largest enjoying a private ensuite bathroom. Smart-home features, updated plumbing, and a newer roof provide peace of mind for years to come. This coveted pocket puts you within walking distance of top schools, green spaces, and vibrant dining.
keyFeatures: Steps to TTC subway and streetcar
Pot lights and designer fixtures throughout
Fenced yard ideal for children and pets
